ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the track */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the track */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album the track belongs to */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre the track belongs to */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the track in beats per minute */,
  "mood" TEXT /* Mood of the track (e.g., happy, sad, energetic) */,
  "instrumentation" TEXT /* Instrumentation used in the track (e.g., guitar, piano, drums) */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the track in minutes or seconds */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the track */,
  "is_explicit" INTEGER /* Whether the track contains explicit content */,
  "popularity" REAL /* Popularity score of the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre the artist belongs to */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the artist */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers for the artist */,
  "popularity" REAL /* Popularity score of the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "cover_art" TEXT /* Cover art of the album */,
  "total_tracks" INTEGER /* Total number of tracks in the album */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre the album belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the user */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers for the user */,
  "following" INTEGER /* Number of artists/users the user is following */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Whether the playlist is public or private */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers for the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_tracks" (
  "playlist_track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist-track combination */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track added to the playlist */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the track was added to the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_tracks_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_tracks_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_features" (
  "track_feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track feature */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., tempo, mood) */,
  "feature_value" REAL /* Value of the feature */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability score of the track */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy score of the track */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness score of the track */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness score of the track */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness score of the track */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness score of the track */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence score of the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_features_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_tracks" (
  "user_track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-track combination */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track accessed by the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the track was accessed */,
  "played_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the track was played by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_tracks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_tracks_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artist_tracks" (
  "artist_track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist-track combination */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track created by the artist */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the artist in the track (e.g., main artist, featured artist) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_tracks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_tracks_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "album_tracks" (
  "album_track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album-track combination */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track added to the album */,
  "track_number" INTEGER /* Track number of the track in the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_album_tracks_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_album_tracks_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genre_tracks" (
  "genre_track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre-track combination */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track belonging to the genre */,
  "genre_weight" REAL /* Weight of the genre for the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genre_tracks_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genre_tracks_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)
